notes: Shopify inbound sale sync (PR #441): adds the missing Shopify->HB path. ShopifyOrderSyncService polls paid Shopify orders, marks matched LISTED inventory SOLD (sold_platform='shopify', discount/refund-aware, idempotent), archives/decrements the Shopify product, and ends the matching eBay listing via new EbayDelistingService (EndFixedPriceItem, idempotent on already-ended, SKU-less id-prefix fallback). ShopifySyncService.reconcileInventoryQuantities clamps overstated Shopify qty (mapped+orphan) to true LISTED count. Wired into the scheduled full-sync cron (Step 5b) + dedicated /api/cron/shopify-orders route. Two migrations applied to cloud: chk_sold_platform widened to allow shopify/brickowl, chk_platform_orders_platform widened to allow shopify (BOTH required - missing the 2nd would make the feature inert; caught in code review), shopify_config.last_order_sync_at cursor added, set 6474 backfilled sold_platform='shopify'. Pre-merge Track A: clamped 104 live overstated Shopify variants to true LISTED count (oversell exposure now 0). Historical order #1002 will be auto-ingested into platform_orders on the first production cron run. previousCommit a5b89aa3 (PR #439) for rollback.
